    throw new Error(

  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/layouts/PlatformAdminLayout.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;

    });
  });
